title: praealstonia coccinea
intro: Praealstonia coccinea, also known as red alstonia, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, Praealstonia coccinea has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, inflammation, and other health issues. The plant is said to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting relaxation. Praealstonia coccinea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various ailments.
